L1.head: Integration of meta-materials with topological structure and phase gradients into traditional optical system
L1.tail: Breaking chromatic aberration and diffraction limit constraints in terahertz super-resolution imaging
L1.claim: 集成超材料到传统系统可突破色差和衍射极限的限制

L2.head: Meta-materials design
L2.claim: 超材料设计允许精确操控太赫兹波前

L2.head: Adjusting dispersion characteristics
L2.claim: 调整色散特性使得补偿色差成为可能

L2.head: Topological structure
L2.claim: 拓扑结构导致非平凡相位奇点的引入

L2.head: Non-trivial phase singularities
L2.tail: Localizing terahertz field beyond diffraction limit
L2.claim: 非平凡相位奇点使得超越衍射极限的局域成为可能
